title: Update the readme with all of the new features we
description: Update the readme with all of the new features we added. Don’t miss any

log.outcome: The specification provides a comprehensive plan for updating the README.md to document all new features added to the project. The mission is clear, steps are well-structured with concrete checkboxes, and the file scope is accurate (single file modification + changeset). The spec correctly references actual features found in the codebase including model presets, workflow steps, scheduled tasks, GitHub integration, and various CLI commands.

log.action: Completed Step 0 (Preflight). Identified all features missing from README: Model System, expanded GitHub Integration, Task Planning & Creation, Workflow Steps, Dashboard Features (terminal, git manager, activity log, search, archive, themes), CLI commands (git, plan, archive, duplicate, retry, steer, logs), Configuration Reference, and Multi-Step Scheduled Tasks.
log.outcome: Ready to begin implementing documentation updates

log.action: plan review requested for Step 1 (Add Model System Section)

log.outcome: The plan for Step 1 is well-structured and the checkboxes cover the essential model system features from AGENTS.md: model presets, per-task overrides, global/project settings hierarchy, and planning/validator models. The work will integrate correctly into the README update task.

log.action: plan review requested for Step 2 (Expand GitHub Integration Section)

log.outcome: The plan's checkboxes will successfully guide the worker to enhance the GitHub Integration section. The core outcomes—documenting the `pr-create` CLI command and WebSocket badge updates—are well-defined. There is one minor factual inaccuracy (PR import doesn't exist as a feature), but this won't derail the implementation since the README already correctly describes issue import with PR filtering.

log.action: plan review requested for Step 3 (Add Task Planning & Creation Section)

log.outcome: The plan for Step 3 comprehensively covers all four major task planning and creation features: Planning Mode (CLI and dashboard), subtask breakdown dialog, AI text refinement, and manual plan approval. The checkboxes align with the feature requirements from the changesets and AGENTS.md documentation.

log.action: Step 3 (Add Task Planning & Creation Section) → in-progress
Step 3 (Add Task Planning & Creation Section) → done
plan review requested for Step 4 (Add Workflow Steps Section)

log.outcome: Step 4's checkboxes comprehensively cover the workflow steps feature documentation requirements. The plan captures the key user-facing aspects: quality gate definition, built-in templates, and the results viewer. The existing README already has a brief Workflow Steps section, and this step will expand it to match the detail level of other major features.

log.action: plan review requested for Step 5 (Expand Dashboard Features Section)

log.outcome: Step 5 is well-defined and achievable. All eight dashboard features listed in the checkboxes exist in the codebase and are user-facing features worthy of README documentation. The step appropriately expands the current minimal "Board UI" section (which has only 4 bullet points) into comprehensive documentation covering the full dashboard capability set.

log.action: plan review requested for Step 6 (Expand CLI Commands Section)

log.outcome: The plan for Step 6 correctly identifies the major new CLI commands that need documentation. The checkboxes align well with the actual command implementations in `packages/cli/src/bin.ts`. All commands listed in the checkboxes exist and are properly implemented. However, there are several existing commands not mentioned in Step 6 that should be explicitly acknowledged as "already documented" or added to ensure comprehensive coverage.

log.action: plan review requested for Step 7 (Add Configuration Reference Section)

log.outcome: The plan for Step 7 provides a clear checklist for adding a comprehensive configuration reference section to README.md. The step focuses on documenting settings not already covered in other sections (like Model System and Dashboard Features). The approach of creating a settings reference table plus documenting specific important settings will achieve the stated outcome of comprehensive configuration documentation.

log.action: plan review requested for Step 8 (Add Multi-Step Scheduled Tasks Section)

log.outcome: The plan for Step 8 is **incomplete**. While it correctly identifies the need to document multi-step scheduled tasks, it misses critical details about the dashboard UI, omits important caveats about the AI prompt step implementation, and fails to document key configuration details like schedule presets and storage location. The feature has significant dashboard surface area that isn't captured in the step checkboxes.

log.action: Step 8 (Add Multi-Step Scheduled Tasks Section) → in-progress
Step 8 (Add Multi-Step Scheduled Tasks Section) → done

Typecheck found an error in packages/cli/src/commands/task.ts which is unrelated to README changes. This appears to be a pre-existing issue. The README documentation updates are complete and don't affect TypeScript compilation.
log.outcome: Pre-existing type error in CLI package, not related to README updates

summary: Comprehensive README update completed. Added 8 new major sections: Model System (presets, per-task overrides, settings hierarchy), Task Planning & Creation (planning mode, subtask breakdown, manual approval), expanded GitHub Integration (real-time badges, PR creation CLI), Workflow Steps (with 5 built-in templates), Dashboard Features (interactive terminal, git manager, activity log, search, themes, archive), expanded CLI Commands (git, plan, archive, duplicate, retry, steer, logs), Configuration Reference (comprehensive settings table), and Scheduled Tasks (multi-step with command/AI steps). Fixed duplicate Architecture header and restored Archive section. Changeset created for patch release.
